feature: CHG-FEAT-007 Fulfillment Product Price Catalog (Phases 2-5 continuation)

blocker_resolution.direction: User granted explicit permission (2026-04-19) to amend CHG-FEAT-007 and to ALTER fulfillment.SalesOrders to add CustomerAccountId int NOT NULL + CurrencyCode nvarchar(3) NOT NULL columns. Backfill in Up() from customers.CustomerAccounts primary account (IsPrimary=1, IsDeleted=0, lowest Id on ties). Fail loudly if any SO has no primary account. Caller supplies CustomerAccountId + CurrencyCode on CreateSalesOrderRequest; columns are immutable after creation. Fulfillment.API trusts the caller for now (no HttpClient to Customers.API in this iteration).
